title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Ola Cabs Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Ola Cabs Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Ola Cabs Global Group are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ola Cabs Global Group:
Ola Cabs Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ola Cabs Global Group!
